title: chaenorhinum origanifolium var. mutelii
intro: Chaenorhinum origanifolium var. mutelii is a lesser-known variety of the Chaenorhinum origanifolium plant, also known as the 'Spanish eye of Jerusalem' or 'Small Toadflax.' This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin irritations. The health benefits of Chaenorhinum origanifolium var. mutelii include its ability to soothe and calm the digestive system, making it a potential remedy for digestive issues such as irritable bowel syndrome. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
